title: The Saruyama Alliance Gets Involved
description: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
scene: Across pages 13, 15, 16, 17, this scene centers on Mont Blanc Cricket, Masira, Shojo, Luffy, Usopp. Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: One day, upon returning from another voyage,

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Noland reported to the King thus:

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: And sailed for the Grand Line!

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: So this Montblane Mont Blanc Cricket,

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Is the descendant of Momblanc Noland!?

dialogue.speaker: Shojo
dialogue.text: Yeah, as kids from North Blue,

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Things are gettin' even more interesting!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What're you lookin' at me for!?

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: A brave warrior of the seas...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: W-what do you think you're doin'!?

dialogue.speaker: Mont Blanc Cricket
dialogue.text: Just who the hell are you people!?

summary: Cricket’s obsession with the lost city of gold and his ancestor’s disgrace gives the Sky Island search emotional weight.
